_comment_enabledStores: Deprecated — use config/upselling-stores.json per store enabled flag
_comment_syncAllStores: One MMX export with Entity column per row updates every enabled store.
_comment_peakWindows: Only used when updateSchedule is peak (not hourly)
_comment_syncDayMode: today | yesterday | all | YYYY-MM-DD — after backfill, only this day is updated each sync
_comment_backfillOnFirstSync: First regional sync loads every fiscal day in the export once, then syncDayMode applies
_comment_biFolderPath: Report tree folders before Upsell by Cashier (empty = try default BI view, then VIC → Ash)
_comment_biEntryUrl: Optional fallback only — tree navigation uses sidebar, not a direct URL
_comment_biReportUrl: Leave empty to use sidebar + tree; set only for direct-report fallback
